name: CVR ENERGY INC
summary: CVR Energy Inc is an independent petroleum refiner and nitrogen fertilizer manufacturer. The company operates petroleum refineries producing gasoline, diesel, jet fuel, and other refined products, as well as nitrogen fertilizer facilities producing ammonia and UAN (urea ammonium nitrate). CVR Energy also has operations in renewables including renewable diesel and biodiesel. Its refineries are located in the midcontinent United States, serving Group 3 and surrounding markets.

products.name: Gasoline
products.description: Refined petroleum product produced at CVR's midcontinent refineries for transportation fuel markets.

products.name: Diesel Fuel / ULSD
products.description: Ultra low sulfur diesel and distillate refined products produced for transportation and commercial markets.

products.name: Jet Fuel
products.description: Refined petroleum product produced at CVR's refineries for aviation fuel markets.

products.name: Ammonia
products.description: Direct application nitrogen fertilizer and industrial building block produced at nitrogen fertilizer facilities.

products.name: UAN
products.description: Urea ammonium nitrate aqueous solution used as a fertilizer, produced at nitrogen fertilizer facilities.

products.name: Renewable Diesel
products.description: Advanced biofuel chemically identical to petroleum diesel, produced from renewable feedstocks using heat, pressure, and hydrogen.

products.name: Biodiesel
products.description: Renewable fuel manufactured from vegetable oils, animal fats, or recycled restaurant grease for use in diesel vehicles.
